name: Google Tasks
description: Display tasks and todos due today from Google Tasks

config.title: Google Tasks Settings
config.description: Uses the same OAuth credentials as Google Calendar. Create OAuth 2.0 credentials in Google Cloud Console, enable both Google Calendar API and Google Tasks API, and set the authorized redirect URI. Paste the Client ID and Client Secret here (or in Calendar settings).

fields.label: Client ID
fields.description: The OAuth Client ID from Google Cloud Console. Can be shared with Calendar component.

fields.label: Client Secret
fields.description: The OAuth Client Secret. Can be shared with Calendar component.

fields.label: Max Tasks
fields.description: Maximum number of tasks to display (default: 20)
